name: Grade 1 Outdoor Adventure — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 1 pathway for first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Outdoor Adventure. Learning builds independence through investigation, guided practice, application, and reflection.
learningGoals: Develop first-grade knowledge and skills in first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Outdoor Adventure.
Use speaking, drawing, writing, numbers, models, or movement to explain thinking.
Work independently when ready and ask for help, feedback, or clarification when needed.

lessons.title: Explore first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Outdoor Adventure
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Outdoor Adventure by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

lessons.title: Practice first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Outdoor Adventure
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Outdoor Adventure by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

resources.title: Leave No Trace and outdoor safety guidance
resources.description: Planning reference for this Grade 1 Outdoor Adventure pathway.

units.title: Investigate: first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Outdoor Adventure
units.essentialQuestion: What evidence can we gather about first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Outdoor Adventure?
outcomes: I can observe, discuss, and record first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Outdoor Adventure.
I can use accurate words, pictures, numbers, models, writing, or movement to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Explore first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Outdoor Adventure
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Outdoor Adventure by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

activities.title: Notice and investigate
activities.learnerAction: The learner uses age-appropriate materials and first-grade vocabulary to observe, discuss, and record first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Outdoor Adventure. Adult supervision is provided whenever the subject involves tools, heat, animals, water, traffic, or online media.

successCriteria: The learner completes a first-grade task connected to first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Outdoor Adventure.
The learner explains an observation, choice, or strategy with appropriate support.
The learner follows safety, care, and collaboration expectations.
